reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Enter the code sent to {{email}}, then choose your new password.
reset.resent: New code sent — the previous one no longer works.

banners.accountCreated: Account created! Check your inbox to confirm your address.

errors.emailExists: An account already exists with this email.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in.
errors.samePassword: The new password must be different from the old one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.emailRateLimited: Too many emails sent. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.userNotFound: No account linked to this email.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired, log in again.
errors.otpExpired: Invalid or expired code. Request a new one.
errors.usernameTaken: That username is taken. Try another one.

validation.usernameTooShort: Your username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.usernameTooLong: Your username must be at most 20 characters.
validation.usernameCharset: Letters, numbers and _ only (no spaces or accents).
validation.passwordTooShort: Your password must be at least 8 characters.
